title: FastExpPickup
description: Makes picking up experience orbs configuratively faster.
body:
## Configure the experience orbs pickup speed
### -completely serverside-

![set pickup delay to 10000](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f98c74f3e7342f7bad1f4c816760182c937117c1_0.webp)

![Config File](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69bd96e2f97117ef3921779b1ddae4147a738079.png)

**pickup delay**: sets the time in ticks between two possible orb pickups

**orb per pickup tick**: once the player can pick up orbs again, make experience gain even faster by picking up multiple orbs per tick; max amount set here

_more game versions to come on interest_

but I would just use [the Clumps mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps) for better performance once its out for the newer Versions
